title: CVE-2026-11527: Config::IniFiles RCE
summary: [P1] Config::IniFiles versions before 3.001000 for Perl allow OS command injection, and there is no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited for arbitrary code execution. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution, which is a clear case of rce.

title: CVE-2026-54410: nanoMODBUS Buffer Overflow
